case_title: KATHLEEN HESLIN VS. VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HESLIN, KATHLEEN ANN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HESLIN, KATHLEEN ANN AS TO DEFENDANT VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN HESLIN AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MARK ROBSON, VICE-PRESIDENT OF VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT HESLIN, KATHLEEN ANN $560.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (CERTIFIED MAIL NOT SIGNED FOR BY NAMED PERSON: WALT YOUNGMAN, JR.) SERVED MAY-23-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MARK ROBSON, VICE-PRESIDENT OF VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE, AND CROSS-DEFENDANT KATHLEEN HESLIN. NO PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT CROSS-DEFENDANT HESLIN WAIVED SERVICE OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HESLIN, KATHLEEN ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
